April 20

hey, shubhi.

don't scroll, just read.

something important is about to happen to you.

🐻 a bubu dudu production 🐼
keep reading

happy birthday, shubhi

to my favourite
person.

one month in and you've already made everything
stupidly, unreasonably better.

here's to you being annoyingly kuchupuchu —
and here's to me being the luckiest person in the room.

happy birthday. 🐼

(it's not that deep, shubhi.)

one more thing

will you go on a date with me?

as a birthday treat. obviously.
(totally not because i really want to see you.)

i knew it.
obviously.

bubu & dudu: going on a date.

it's going to be the best birthday treat ever.
(because i planned it. obviously.)

us rn (accurate)

made with love · for shubhi · april 2026
